title: Ice's Karts
body:
Its a simple Boat replacement for like, ice boat racing.

I couldnt find anything I really liked for a while so I made my own! and then made the wheels spin!

the trophies require custom model data to show:
- Gold - (gold ingot) custom_model_data: 6390002
- Iron - (iron ingot) custom_model_data: 6390002
- Bronze - (copper ingot) custom_model_data: 6390003

I might add some more stuff in the future for ambiance but with my track record of not returning to add things I cant promise anything

if you're intrested in the skins I used in the picture let me know in the comments
